keys.restored: የቁልፍ ምትኬ ተመልሷል ✓ ቁልፎች በመሣሪያው ላይ ተጭነዋል

keySetup.title: የመሣሪያዎን ቁልፎች ያዘጋጁ
keySetup.description: ይህ device doesn’t have የእርስዎ የግል key yet. Import የይለፍ ቃል-protected backup, ወይም generate አዲስ keypair (እርስዎ’ll be able ወደ read አዲስ መልዕክቶች ከ now በርቷል).
keySetup.chooseFile: ፋይል ይምረጡ እና የይለፍ ቃሉን ያስገቡ።
keySetup.imported: የግል ቁልፉ ወደዚህ መሣሪያ ገብቷል። አሁን የቀድሞ መልዕክቶችን ማንበብ ይችላሉ።
keySetup.enterPassword: ቁልፎችዎን በደህና ለመቀመጥ የመለያዎን የይለፍ ቃል ያስገቡ።

auth.headline: ለማንኛውም ሰው፣ በማንኛውም ቦታ ደህንነቱ የተጠበቀ መልዕክት
auth.description: ከጫፍ እስከ ጫፍ ምስጠራ፣ ወደ 100+ ቋንቋዎች ትርጉም፣ የሚጠፉ መልዕክቶች፣ እና የድምጽ/ቪዲዮ ጥሪ።

hero.line1: Secure messaging ለ anyone, anywhere — ከ
hero.sub: Get ነፃ secure ስልክ ቁጥር ወደ ጥሪ እና text worldwide over Wi-Fi ወይም ዳታ. Enjoy end-ወደ-end encryption, disappearing መልዕክቶች, እና HD voice/ቪዲዮ calling — ከ built-በ tools that እገዛ እርስዎ stay connected across borders.
hero.freeNote: Basic calling እና texting are ነፃ. Advanced AI እና premium features require አሻሽል.

feat.translate: Break ቋንቋ barriers በ የእርስዎ conversations

auth.desktopTip: በርቷል desktop? Scan ከ የእርስዎ phone ወደ get app.
auth.scanHelper: በርቷል desktop? Scan ከ የእርስዎ phone ወደ get app.
auth.subhead: የግል, encrypted, እና translated messaging — instantly.
auth.tip: Tip: Use same መለያ በርቷል web እና mobile. የእርስዎ መልዕክቶች stay synced.
auth.scanHint: Scan ወደ download app ወይም ክፈት በ የእርስዎ browser.

registration.passwordDescription: Minimum 6 characters. Use strong, unique የይለፍ ቃል.
registration.smsConsent: By creating መለያ, እርስዎ agree ወደ receive SMS notifications related ወደ የእርስዎ Chatforia activity (such as መልዕክቶች ከ other users). Message & ዳታ rates may apply. እርስዎ can opt out at any time በ ቅንብሮች.

auth.oneRecipient: Please enter one recipient ለ now.
auth.enterValidRecipient: saved እውቂያ ስም ወይም ስልክ ቁጥር. ያስገቡ።

home.title: መነሻ
home.messagesSubtitle: recipient above, then ላክ መልዕክት ወደ ጀምር conversation. ያስገቡ።
home.mixedRecipients: Mixed recipients detected. Use either all phone numbers (SMS) ወይም all usernames (Chatforia).
home.needNumber: እርስዎ need Chatforia ቁጥር before sending SMS.

refund.title: የተመላሽ ገንዘብ ፖሊሲ
refund.intro: At Chatforia, we strive ወደ provide high-quality service ወደ all users. ይህ Refund Policy outlines when refunds may be issued.

subscriptions.title: ምዝገባዎች
subscriptions.body: Subscriptions are billed በ advance በርቷል recurring basis. እርስዎ may ሰርዝ at any time through የእርስዎ መለያ ቅንብሮች ወይም platform used ወደ purchase.

eligibility.title: ለተመላሽ ገንዘብ ብቁነት
eligibility.body: Refunds may be granted ለ duplicate charges, ክፍያ errors, ወይም technical issues preventing access ወደ paid features. All requests are reviewed case-በ-case.

nonRefundable.title: የማይመለስ
nonRefundable.body: We generally do not provide refunds ለ unused time, partial subscription periods, ወይም failure ወደ ሰርዝ before renewal.

thirdParty.title: የሶስተኛ ወገን ግዢዎች
thirdParty.body: If purchased through third-party platforms such as Apple App Store, refunds must be requested directly through those platforms.

contact.title: እውቂያ
contact.body: ድጋፍ@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

whyMessaging.title: የመልዕክት መድረኮች ከመቼውም ጊዜ በላይ ለምን አስፈላጊ እንደሆኑ
whyMessaging.intro: Messaging platforms have become one የ most important tools ለ communication በ today’s world. From personal conversations ወደ business interactions, messaging apps allow people ወደ stay connected instantly እና efficiently.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: People rely በርቷል messaging apps ለ daily communication ከ friends, ቤተሰብ, እና colleagues. Whether it's quick update ወይም long conversation, messaging provides convenient እና flexible way ወደ stay በ touch.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: One የ main advantages የ messaging platforms is their speed. Messages are delivered instantly, allowing users ወደ communicate በ real time. ይህ level የ convenience has made messaging preferred method የ communication ለ many people.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Messaging platforms connect people across globe. With internet access, users can communicate regardless የ location, making it easier ወደ build relationships እና collaborate internationally.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Modern messaging platforms focus በርቷል giving users control over their ዳታ እና conversations. Features like encryption, ግላዊነት ቅንብሮች, እና መልዕክት controls allow users ወደ communicate ከ confidence.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Messaging continues ወደ evolve ከ አዲስ features such as AI-powered responses, ትርጉም, እና multimedia sharing. As technology advances, messaging platforms will become even more powerful እና versatile.
whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia is built ከ these principles በ mind, offering fast, secure, እና user-friendly messaging experience ለ connected world.

global.title: The Future የ Global Communication
global.intro: Communication has evolved rapidly over past few decades. What once ያስፈልጋል phone ጥሪዎች ወይም በ-person meetings can now be done quickly through messaging platforms. As technology continues ወደ advance, global communication is becoming faster, more accessible, እና more inclusive.
global.barriersDesc: One የ biggest changes በ communication is reduction የ geographic barriers. People can now connect ከ others across world በ near real time. Whether ለ personal conversations, business, ወይም collaboration, messaging platforms have made distance far less limiting.
global.translationDesc: ቋንቋ has traditionally been one የ biggest obstacles ወደ global communication. Today, built-በ ትርጉም tools እገዛ bridge that gap. Platforms like Chatforia allow users ወደ communicate more easily even if they speak different languages, creating አዲስ opportunities ለ connection እና understanding.
global.realtimeDesc: Speed is key factor shaping modern communication. Users expect መልዕክቶች ወደ be delivered quickly, እና modern infrastructure supports that expectation. Real-time messaging enables more natural እና fluid conversations.
global.privacyDesc: As communication becomes more digital, ግላዊነት እና ደህንነት are increasingly important. Users want confidence that their conversations are protected. Features like encryption እና user-controlled ቅንብሮች እገዛ ድጋፍ more secure communication experience.
global.futureDesc: The future የ global communication will likely include more advanced tools, such as AI-assisted messaging, improved ትርጉም, እና enhanced user experiences. As technology evolves, communication will continue ወደ become more intuitive እና accessible.
global.outro: Platforms like Chatforia are part የ ይህ shift, helping people connect more easily across languages እና borders.

index.title: የChatforia ብሎግ
index.intro: Explore insights በርቷል communication, online safety, እና how messaging technology is connecting people around world.

howItWorks.title: Chatforia እንዴት እንደሚሰራ
howItWorks.intro: Chatforia is designed ወደ make communication simple, fast, እና accessible. Getting started takes just few steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up using የእርስዎ ኢሜይል ወይም username ወደ ፍጠር የእርስዎ Chatforia መለያ.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Connect ከ others በ selecting እውቂያዎች ወይም starting አዲስ chats.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Messages are delivered quickly ወደ provide smooth communication experience.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Built-በ ትርጉም helps users communicate across different languages.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Manage የእርስዎ preferences, እውቂያዎች, እና communication ቅንብሮች.

safety.title: ደህንነት እና የማህበረሰብ መመሪያዎች
safety.intro: Chatforia is committed ወደ maintaining safe እና respectful environment ለ all users. These guidelines እገዛ ensure positive experience ለ everyone.
safety.respectDesc: Users are expected ወደ communicate respectfully. Harassment, abuse, ወይም harmful behavior is not permitted.

tools.block: Block users ወደ prevent further interaction

safety.enforcementDesc: We may take action against accounts that violate these guidelines, including warnings, restrictions, ወይም permanent removal ከ platform.

chat.selectPrompt: መወያየት ለመጀመር ጽሑፍ ወይም የውይይት ክፍል ይምረጡ
chat.blockConfirm: Block {{ስም}}? እርስዎ won't receive መልዕክቶች ከ them. {{name}}
chat.blockError: Could not determine target user ወደ block.

messageInput.freeLimit: የነፃ ዕቅድ ገደብ፦ እስከ 1 ቀን ራስ-ሰር ማጥፋት። ወደ 1 ቀን ተገድቧል።
messageInput.premiumLimit: ለPremium ከፍተኛው ራስ-ሰር ማጥፋት 30 ቀን ነው። ወደ 30 ቀን ተገድቧል።
messageInput.nothingToSend: ለመላክ መልዕክት ይጻፉ ወይም ፋይል ያያይዙ።
messageInput.caption: መግለጫ (አማራጭ)

errors.attachmentTooLarge: Attachment too large. Try smaller ፋይል.
errors.rateLimit: እርስዎ’re sending መልዕክቶች too quickly. Please slow down.
errors.validation: Validation ስህተት. Please check የእርስዎ መልዕክት እና try again.
errors.failedToSend: አልተሳካም ወደ ላክ. እርስዎ can retry አልተሳካም bubble.

contactList.couldNotStart: Could not ጀምር chat. Please try again.
contactList.startFailed: አልተሳካም ወደ ጀምር chat. Please try again.
contactList.deleteFailed: አልተሳካም ወደ ሰርዝ እውቂያ. Please try again.
contactList.updateAliasFailed: አልተሳካም ወደ update alias. Please try again.
contactList.loadFailed: እውቂያዎች. Please try again. መጫን አልተሳካም።
contactList.callStarted: ይህን ቁጥር በChatforia ቁጥርዎ በኩል እየጠራን ነው…
contactList.callFailed: አልተሳካም ወደ ጀምር ጥሪ. Please try again.

startChatModal.searchPlaceholder: ስም፣ የተጠቃሚ ስም፣ ወይም ስልክ ቁጥር ፈልግ

addContactModal.title: እውቂያ ጨምር
addContactModal.enterPhoneOrUsername: ስልክ ቁጥር ወይም የተጠቃሚ ስም ያስገቡ።

sidebar.loginPrompt: Log በ ወደ edit የእርስዎ ቅንብሮች.

mediaGallery.noMediaCached: እስካሁን በመሣሪያው ላይ የተቀመጠ ሚዲያ የለም።

status.filesNote: Up ወደ 5 files. 24h expiry በ default.

profile.title: የተጠቃሚ መገለጫ
profile.noPrivateKey: There is አይ የግል key በርቷል ይህ device ወደ export.
profile.setBackupPassword: Set የይለፍ ቃል ወደ encrypt የእርስዎ backup:
profile.enterBackupPassword: የይለፍ ቃል ለ ይህ backup: ያስገቡ።
profile.importSuccess: የግል key imported ወደ ይህ device.
profile.importFailed: አልተሳካም ወደ import key (incorrect የይለፍ ቃል ወይም corrupt ፋይል).
profile.keysRotated: አዲስ key pair generated እና ህዝባዊ key uploaded.
profile.keyDisclaimer: የእርስዎ የግል key never leaves ይህ device. Export የይለፍ ቃል-protected copy ወደ restore it በርቷል another device.
profile.themeFreeNotice: እርስዎ’re በርቷል ነፃ—use quick Sun/Moon options below. አሻሽል ወደ unlock more themes.
profile.backupDesc: Back up የእርስዎ encryption key ወደ securely restore የእርስዎ መልዕክቶች በርቷል another device.
profile.freePlanCopy: እርስዎ’re በርቷል ነፃ ዕቅድ. አሻሽል ወደ unlock more features like backups, extra numbers, እና advanced ግላዊነት options.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Could not ክፈት ክፍያ portal. Please try again.
profile.notifyOnCopy: Notify me if የእኔ መልዕክት is copied
profile.followHint: Their stories will appear በ የእርስዎ Following feed if they post ከ audience Followers (ወይም ህዝባዊ).
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Forward ገቢ ጥሪዎች እና texts ወደ የእርስዎ verified phone ወይም ኢሜይል. ወጪ ጥሪዎች/texts can show የእርስዎ Chatforia ቁጥር.
profile.errSmsDest: at least one destination (phone ወይም ኢሜይል). ይምረጡ።
profile.errQuietHours: Quiet hours must be between 0 እና 23.
profile.ageBandHint: We only store age range (not የእርስዎ exact date የ birth). ይህ is used ወደ keep Random Chat pairings reasonable.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Use age-based matching በ Random Chat
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: When በርቷል, we try ወደ pair እርስዎ ከ people በ compatible age ranges.
profile.partnerAgeBands: Who can እርስዎ be matched ከ?
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Teens are always matched only ከ other teens. Adults cannot be matched ከ teens.
profile.teenMatchingNote: For safety, accounts በ 13–17 age range can only be matched ከ other 13–17 accounts በ Random Chat.
profile.foriaRemember: Let Ria remember things እርስዎ tell it
profile.foriaRememberDesc: When ይህ is በርቷል, Foria can use የእርስዎ past Random Chat conversations (just ከ እርስዎ) ወደ keep conversation flowing. እርስዎ can turn ይህ ጠፍቷል any time.
profile.voicemailForwardEmailPlaceholder: ኢሜይል ወደ ላክ voicemail notifications ወደ
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Used when የእርስዎ ድምጽ greeting is unavailable.
profile.voicemailNote: Voicemails ከ የእርስዎ Chatforia numbers will be stored በ የእርስዎ Voicemail inbox. እርስዎ can enable transcription እና forwarding በ supported ዕቅዶች.
profile.portHint: Want ወደ keep የእርስዎ የአሁኑ ቁጥር? እርስዎ can port it into Chatforia Wireless.

esim.title: Chatforia eSIM
esim.desc: Get mobile ዳታ ለ Chatforia when እርስዎ’re away ከ Wi-Fi.

wireless.title: Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: የChatforia ሞባይል ዕቅድዎን፣ ቁጥሮችዎን፣ ማስተላለፊያን እና ቁጥር ማዛወርን ያስተዳድሩ።

options.heading: how እርስዎ want ወደ use Chatforia ይምረጡ።
options.subheading: እርስዎ can get አዲስ Chatforia ቁጥር, ወይም bring የእርስዎ existing ቁጥር ከ another carrier.
options.portNumber: Port የእርስዎ የአሁኑ ቁጥር into Chatforia Wireless

port.heading: Port የእርስዎ existing ቁጥር
port.subheading: Move የእርስዎ የአሁኑ ስልክ ቁጥር ከ የእርስዎ existing carrier into Chatforia. Make sure details match የእርስዎ carrier መለያ exactly ወደ avoid delays.
port.success: Port request submitted! We’ll keep እርስዎ ተዘምኗል።

status.heading: የቁጥር ማዛወር ሁኔታ
status.subheading: Track status የ የእርስዎ ቁጥር port requests.

wireless.exhausted: የእርስዎ ዳታ has run out. Buy አዲስ ጥቅል ወደ continue using mobile ዳታ.

error.invite: Could not ፍጠር invite. Make sure እርስዎ are ቤተሰብ ባለቤት እና try again.
error.checkout: We could not ጀምር checkout ለ ቤተሰብ ዕቅድ. Please try again.

billing.freePlanCopy: እርስዎ’re በርቷል ነፃ ዕቅድ. አሻሽል ወደ unlock more features.
billing.portalError: Unable ወደ ክፈት ክፍያ portal right now.
billing.cancelNowHelp: እርስዎ can manage ወይም ሰርዝ የእርስዎ subscription በ ክፍያ portal, ወይም ሰርዝ immediately below.
billing.cancelNowConfirm: Are እርስዎ sure እርስዎ want ወደ ሰርዝ የእርስዎ ዕቅድ immediately? ይህ cannot be undone.
billing.cancelNowError: Unable ወደ ሰርዝ የእርስዎ ዕቅድ right now. Please try again ወይም use Manage ክፍያ.

none.title: እስካሁን ቤተሰብ set up የለም።
none.body: To ፍጠር Chatforia ቤተሰብ እና የተጋራ ዳታ pool, ጀምር ቤተሰብ ዕቅድ.

data.heading: የተጋራ ዳታ pool
data.caption: All members share ይህ pool. We’ll warn እርስዎ as እርስዎ approach የእርስዎ limit.

invite.title: አዲስ አባል ጋብዝ
invite.body: ላክ ኢሜይል ወይም link ወደ invite someone into የእርስዎ የተጋራ ቤተሰብ ዳታ pool.
invite.expiryHint: ይህ link expires after few days. እርስዎ can always ፍጠር አዲስ one.

join.title: ቤተሰብ ተቀላቀል
join.body: እርስዎ have been invited ወደ join Chatforia ቤተሰብ እና share their ዳታ pool.
join.success: እርስዎ have joined ይህ ቤተሰብ. እርስዎ now share their ዳታ pool.
join.error: We could not add እርስዎ ወደ ይህ ቤተሰብ. The invite may be invalid ወይም expired.

premium.heading: ወደ Premium አሻሽል
premium.description: ኃይለኛ ባህሪያትን ክፈት እና ማስታወቂያዎችን አስወግድ።

upgrade.title: አሻሽል
upgrade.h1Subtitle: ጀምር ከ our ነፃ, ad-supported ዕቅድ. Go ad-ነፃ ከ Plus, ወይም unlock full power features ከ Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: app ዕቅድ, add ዳታ packs ለ yourself, ወይም share ዳታ ከ የእርስዎ ቤተሰብ — all ከ one place. ይምረጡ።
upgrade.subtitle.app: ጀምር ከ our ነፃ, ad-supported ዕቅድ. Go ad-ነፃ ከ Plus, ወይም unlock full power features ከ Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Add global eSIM ዳታ so Chatforia keeps working even when እርስዎ’re away ከ Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: ፍጠር የተጋራ ዳታ pool ለ የእርስዎ ቤተሰብ እና manage everyone’s usage ከ one place.
upgrade.benefitsLine: ኃይለኛ ባህሪያትን ክፈት እና ማስታወቂያዎችን አስወግድ።

free.title: ነፃ
free.desc: ጀምር messaging ለ ነፃ. Ideal if እርስዎ’re just trying Chatforia.

features.chat: Real-time 1:1 እና group chat, plus voice እና ቪዲዮ ጥሪዎች
features.media: Share photos, voice መልዕክቶች, እና short videos
features.ai: AI-powered smart replies እና instant ትርጉም (fair use)
features.disappearing: Disappearing መልዕክቶች እና basic ግላዊነት controls
features.ads: ነፃ forever ከ ads በ app

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: All essentials, without ads. Great ለ everyday messaging እና calling.

features.allFree: Everything በ ነፃ, ከ አይ ads
features.forwarding: Forward ጥሪዎች እና texts ወደ የእርስዎ real ስልክ ቁጥር
features.support: Faster ድጋፍ when something goes wrong

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (ወርሃዊ)
premiumMonthly.desc: The full Chatforia experience: AI power tools, customization, እና priority ድጋፍ.

features.themes: Unlock all premium color themes እና app customizations
features.ai: Premium-only AI power tools ለ rewrites, smart replies, እና summaries
features.support: Priority ድጋፍ when እርስዎ need እገዛ most

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (ዓመታዊ)
premiumAnnual.desc: አስቀምጥ more when billed yearly — including extra color themes, AI tools, እና priority ድጋፍ.

features.allPremium: Everything በ Premium Monthly — including extra color themes
features.save25: አስቀምጥ around 30% compared ወደ paying monthly
features.bestFor: Best ለ power users, remote workers, እና heavy travelers

premiumAnnual.ctaPublic: አስቀምጥ 30% ከ annual – continue ወደ login
premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Billed upfront. ሰርዝ anytime. አይ hidden fees.

marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Full features, ringtones, እና AI power tools.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Billed upfront. ሰርዝ anytime. አይ hidden fees.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (eSIM ዳታ packs)
mobile.subtitle: Add global ዳታ ወደ keep Chatforia working even without Wi-Fi. Prices automatically adjust based በርቷል የእርስዎ አገር እና currency.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Pick one-time global ዳታ ጥቅል so Chatforia keeps working when እርስዎ’re traveling ወይም away ከ Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: We don’t sell ዳታ packs under 3 GB.

features.throttle: Speeds may slow after high usage

disclaimer.devices: eSIM ዳታ packs require eSIM-compatible እና unlocked device. Availability varies በ phone model, carrier, እና አገር. Coverage እና speeds vary በ region.

small.title: መጀመሪያ ጥቅል
small.desc: Includes 3 GB የ high-speed ዳታ — ideal ለ light messaging እና occasional ጥሪዎች.
small.bestFor: Short trips, light messaging, እና occasional ጥሪዎች

medium.title: የተጓዥ ጥቅል
medium.desc: Includes 5 GB የ high-speed ዳታ ለ trips, commuting, እና regular VoIP ጥሪዎች.
medium.bestFor: Weekend trips, regular VoIP ጥሪዎች, እና maps

large.title: የኃይል ጥቅል
large.desc: Includes 10 GB የ high-speed ዳታ ለ heavy chat, ጥሪዎች, እና ቪዲዮ በርቷል Chatforia network.
large.bestFor: Heavy chat, ጥሪዎች, ቪዲዮ, እና hotspot use
large.aria: Buy Power user eSIM ዳታ ጥቅል

compare.title: የeSIM ዳታ ጥቅሎችን ያወዳድሩ
compare.disclaimer: Actual ዳታ usage depends በርቷል how እርስዎ use Chatforia (voice, ቪዲዮ, media, እና other apps በርቷል የእርስዎ phone).

family.title: Chatforia ቤተሰብ (የተጋራ ዳታ)
family.subtitle: Share single ዳታ pool across የእርስዎ ቤተሰብ. One bill, multiple Chatforia accounts, global coverage.

small.title: ቤተሰብ Small
small.desc: Includes 20 GB የ የተጋራ high-speed ዳታ — great ለ 2–3 light users.

medium.title: ቤተሰብ Medium
medium.desc: Includes 40 GB የ የተጋራ high-speed ዳታ — ideal ለ 3–5 ንቁ members.

large.title: ቤተሰብ Large
large.desc: Includes 80 GB የ የተጋራ high-speed ዳታ — ለ power families that are always online.

feature.shared: የተጋራ ዳታ pool ለ የእርስዎ ቤተሰብ
feature.fairUse: Subject ወደ fair-use policy እና local limits

family.disclaimer: ቤተሰብ packs ፍጠር ወይም top up የተጋራ ዳታ pool. እርስዎ can invite እና remove members anytime.
family.footnote: ቤተሰብ packs share single ዳታ pool across linked Chatforia accounts. Availability እና limits depend በርቷል የእርስዎ አገር እና local regulations.

why.title: ሰዎች ለምን ወደ Chatforia እንደሚቀይሩ
why.subtitle: Chatforia gives እርስዎ real ስልክ ቁጥር, smart ትርጉም, እና clear path ወደ go ad-ነፃ when እርስዎ’re ready.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Lighter ads በርቷል ነፃ, simple Plus አሻሽል when እርስዎ’re ready, እና Premium tools TextNow doesn’t offer.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern app, global-first design, እና built-በ ትርጉም instead የ የቀድሞ-school ጥሪ forwarding.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
messengers.body: Text real phone numbers — not just other app users — ከ AI እና status built በ. Great if እርስዎ’re coming ከ apps like TextFree ወይም TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Comparison based በርቷል publicly የሚገኝ information እና may change over time. Other ነፃ-texting apps like TextFree ወይም TextMe are generally similar ወደ TextNow.

free.a: አዎ. The ነፃ ዕቅድ includes Chatforia ቁጥር, calling, እና messaging ከ ads. እርስዎ can stay በርቷል ነፃ as long as እርስዎ like, ወይም አሻሽል ወደ remove ads እና unlock more features.

plusPremium.q: What’s difference between Plus እና Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus removes ads እና extends የእርስዎ መልዕክት history — perfect ለ everyday use. Premium adds extra customization, AI tools ለ rewrites እና replies, እና priority ድጋፍ ለ heavy users.

esim.q: Where do eSIM ዳታ packs work?
esim.a: Chatforia Mobile uses global eSIM coverage. Availability depends በርቷል የእርስዎ አገር እና device. እርስዎ’ll see supported options during activation inside app.

cancel.q: Can I ሰርዝ ወይም change ዕቅዶች anytime?
cancel.a: አዎ. እርስዎ can manage ወይም ሰርዝ የእርስዎ subscription ከ ክፍያ page በ app. Changes take effect at end የ የእርስዎ የአሁኑ ክፍያ period.

family.a: ቤተሰብ packs ፍጠር የተጋራ ዳታ pool across multiple Chatforia accounts. One person pays bill, እና እርስዎ can invite ወይም remove members እና set limits per person.

gettingStarted.title: መጀመሪያ
gettingStarted.subtitle: አዲስ ወደ Chatforia? ይህ quick ጀምር shows essentials so እርስዎ can be productive በ minutes.

alert.text: ይህ guide will grow as we launch አዲስ features. If something’s missing, let us know via

section2.title: 2) ጀምር messaging
section2.item1: ፍጠር DM ወይም Group እና ላክ የእርስዎ first መልዕክት.
section2.item2: Use instant ትርጉም ወደ chat across 100+ languages.
section2.item3: Try disappearing መልዕክቶች እና read receipts በ መገለጫ → ግላዊነት.

section3.title: 3) Go further
section3.item1: እርስዎ can አሻሽል ወደ paid ዕቅድ anytime inside app.
section3.item2: Once እርስዎ’re signed በ, እርስዎ can link additional devices እና set up encrypted backups ከ ቅንብሮች በ app.

account.q: How do I ፍጠር ወይም recover የእኔ መለያ?
account.a: app ወይም use web, tap “ፍጠር መለያ”, verify የእርስዎ ኢሜይል/phone. To recover, use “Forgot የይለፍ ቃል”. አውርድ

privacy.a: አዎ. Messages እና ጥሪዎች are end-ወደ-end encrypted በ default. Only እርስዎ እና recipient can read them.

translate.a: አንቃ “Auto-translate” በ ቅንብሮች → Appearance & ቋንቋ. We translate በርቷል-device where supported, otherwise through secure APIs ከ minimal metadata.

contact.a: Reach us at ድጋፍ@chatforia.com. Include screenshots እና የእርስዎ app version.

contact.title: ያግኙን
contact.successMsg: Thanks—our team will reply በ ኢሜይል.
contact.errorSend: Could not ላክ. Please ኢሜይል ድጋፍ@chatforia.com.

intro.body: ይህ ግላዊነት Policy explains how Chatforia (“we”, “us”) collects, uses, እና shares information when እርስዎ use our apps እና services. We design Chatforia ወደ minimize ዳታ we can access.

infoWeCollect.title: Information we collect
infoWeCollect.account: መለያ info (e.g., ኢሜይል/phone) ወደ ፍጠር እና secure የእርስዎ መለያ.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted content (መልዕክቶች/ጥሪዎች) is end-ወደ-end encrypted; we can’t read it.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, device type, ወይም coarse analytics ወደ improve performance.

sms.title: Mobile phone numbers እና SMS
sms.body: If እርስዎ choose ወደ provide mobile ስልክ ቁጥር, we use it ወደ enable features such as መለያ verification, login alerts, እና user-ወደ-user messaging via SMS where supported. We may ላክ transactional SMS መልዕክቶች related ወደ የእርስዎ መለያ እና activity በርቷል Chatforia. እርስዎ can opt out የ receiving SMS መልዕክቶች at any time በ replying ከ supported opt-out keyword (such as “STOP”) ወይም በ changing የእርስዎ notification preferences በ app. We do not sell የእርስዎ ስልክ ቁጥር ወይም use it ለ unrelated marketing.

howWeUse.title: How we use information
howWeUse.provide: Provide እና secure service (auth, spam/abuse detection).

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: We don’t sell personal ዳታ. We may share limited ዳታ ከ processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) under strict contracts.

rights.title: የእርስዎ rights
rights.body: Depending በርቷል የእርስዎ region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), እርስዎ may request access, correction, deletion, ወይም opt-out የ certain processing. እውቂያ: ግላዊነት@chatforia.com.

retention.title: ዳታ retention & ደህንነት
retention.body: We retain only what’s needed ወደ operate service እና apply industry-standard ደህንነት. E2E content can’t be decrypted በ us.

children.title: Children
children.body: Chatforia isn’t directed ወደ children under 13 (ወይም as ያስፈልጋል በ የእርስዎ local law).

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We’ll post updates here እና revise “Last updated” date.

contact.title: እውቂያ
contact.body: ግላዊነት@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: By using Chatforia እርስዎ agree ወደ these Terms. If እርስዎ do not agree, don’t use service.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Provide accurate info እና keep credentials secure.
accounts.itemResponsibility: እርስዎ’re responsible ለ activity በርቷል የእርስዎ መለያ.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: አይ illegal, abusive, ወይም infringing content; አይ spam ወይም automated abuse.

sms.title: SMS communications
sms.body: If እርስዎ provide mobile ስልክ ቁጥር, እርስዎ agree that Chatforia may ላክ እርስዎ SMS መልዕክቶች related ወደ የእርስዎ መለያ እና use የ service, such as login alerts, ደህንነት notifications, እና መልዕክቶች related ወደ conversations እርስዎ initiate ወይም participate በ. We do not use SMS ለ promotional ወይም marketing መልዕክቶች without የእርስዎ explicit consent. Standard መልዕክት እና ዳታ rates may apply. እርስዎ can opt out የ SMS መልዕክቶች at any time በ replying ከ supported opt-out keyword (ለ example, “STOP”) ወይም በ updating የእርስዎ notification ቅንብሮች በ app.

yourContent.title: የእርስዎ content
yourContent.body: እርስዎ retain rights ወደ የእርስዎ content. እርስዎ grant us necessary rights ወደ operate service (e.g., routing, storage, ትርጉም).

disclaimer.title: Disclaimers & liability
disclaimer.body: Service is provided “as is” without warranties. To fullest extent permitted በ law, Chatforia isn’t liable ለ indirect ወይም consequential damages.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance.

contact.title: እውቂያ
contact.body: ድጋፍ@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Do Not Sell ወይም Share የእኔ Personal Information
doNotSell.body: Chatforia does not sell personal information. California residents can still submit requests under CPRA using button below.

cookies.title: Cookie ቅንብሮች
cookies.body: Chatforia uses minimal cookies (e.g., session, ደህንነት). We don’t use third-party ads cookies. Manage cookies via የእርስዎ browser’s ቅንብሮች.

phoneNumberManager.unableToLoadStatus: Unable ወደ ጫን ስልክ ቁጥር status.
phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: አይ ቁጥር assigned. Pick one በ area code ወደ ጀምር texting.

startChatModal.title: ውይይት ጀምር
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Type ስም, username, phone, ወይም ኢሜይል…
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Type username ወይም phone እና press ፈልግ.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Phone/ኢሜይል entries will be የሚገኝ after እርስዎ አስቀምጥ them as እውቂያዎች.
startChatModal.failedBulkStart: አልተሳካም ወደ ጀምር chat ከ selected recipients.

sounds.freeNotice: እርስዎ’re በርቷል ነፃ — premium tones are shown but locked. አሻሽል ወደ unlock all.

aiSettings.title: AI ቅንብሮች
aiSettings.controlIntro: Control ትርጉም, smart replies, እና ForiaBot auto-responses.
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: ላክ last few received መልዕክቶች (sanitized) ወደ AI ወደ suggest quick replies.
aiSettings.maskProfanity: በAI ጥቆማዎች ውስጥ አስደፋሪ ቃላትን ሸፍን
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: If በርቷል, suggestions returned በ AI will have flagged words masked

accessibilitySettings.title: ተደራሽነት እና ማንቂያዎች
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Options ወደ make Chatforia easier ወደ use without relying በርቷል sound.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Starts at normal size. Increase if እርስዎ prefer larger text በ accessibility ቅንብሮች.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc: Visual alerts ለ መልዕክቶች & ጥሪዎች Show banners እና ርዕስ blink so እርስዎ don’t miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew: Vibrate በርቷል አዲስ መልዕክቶች (when supported) Trigger device vibration ከ notifications.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall: Flash screen በርቷል ገቢ ጥሪ Brief bright flash when ጥሪ rings.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Attach transcript ወደ ድምጽ መልዕክቶች እርስዎ receive.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Show banners እና ርዕስ blink so እርስዎ don’t miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Brief bright flash when ጥሪ rings.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Store only ciphertext በርቷል server. Disables AI/Translate እና moderation previews.

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: በ alias, ስም, username, ወይም phone ፈልግ
peoplePage.quickStartDesc: A few fast ways ወደ get rolling.
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Share የእርስዎ invite link ወደ ጀምር chatting instantly.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Stay በ touch በርቷል go ከ Chatforia ለ iOS እና Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Tip: የእርስዎ መልዕክቶች stay synced across web እና mobile.

randomChat.title: የዘፈቀደ ውይይት
randomChat.description: 'Meet someone አዲስ instantly'. 'We’ll match እርስዎ እና ክፈት temporary chat room.' 'Chat anonymously first. Add Friend later if it feels right.'
randomChat.saveGuard: Only human-ወደ-human chats can be ተቀምጧል።
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: We only store age range (not የእርስዎ exact date የ birth). ይህ is used ወደ keep Random Chat pairings reasonable. To match ከ people (not just RiaBot), set የእርስዎ age band በ ቅንብሮች → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Set የእርስዎ age range በ መገለጫ → Age & Random Chat ወደ be matched ከ people.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: To match ከ people (not just RiaBot), set የእርስዎ age band በ ቅንብሮች → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.subtitle: አዲስ ሰው በቅጽበት ያግኙ፣ ወይም ከRia ጋር መወያየትን ይምረጡ።
randomChat.setAge: Set የእርስዎ age range በ መገለጫ → Age & Random Chat ወደ be matched ከ people.

ria.intro: Hey there 👋 I’m Ria. What’s በርቷል የእርስዎ mind?

greetings.long1: Hey {{ስም}} 👋 I’m here. What’s በርቷል የእርስዎ mind? {{name}}
greetings.long2: Hi {{ስም}} 😊 What would እርስዎ like ወደ talk about today? {{name}}
greetings.long3: Hey {{ስም}}! I’m all ears — what’s up? {{name}}
greetings.long4: Nice ወደ see እርስዎ, {{ስም}} 👋 What’s በርቷል የእርስዎ mind today? {{name}}
greetings.long5: Hey {{ስም}} 🙂 Want ወደ vent, ask, ወይም just chat? {{name}}
greetings.long6: Hi {{ስም}}! I’ve got time — what would እርስዎ like ወደ talk about? {{name}}
greetings.short1: Hey {{ስም}}, I’m still here. What’s up? {{name}}
greetings.short2: Welcome back {{ስም}} 👋 Anything else እርስዎ wanted ወደ add? {{name}}
greetings.short3: Back again, {{ስም}}? 😊 Tell me what’s በርቷል የእርስዎ mind. {{name}}
greetings.short4: Hey {{ስም}} ✨ Ready ወደ pick up where we left ጠፍቷል? {{name}}
greetings.short6: Oh hey {{ስም}}! Got something አዲስ በርቷል የእርስዎ mind? {{name}}

login.title: Continue ወደ Chatforia
login.subtitleReturning: Log በ ወደ የእርስዎ Chatforia መለያ
login.subtitle: Log በ ወደ የእርስዎ Chatforia መለያ

forgot.title: Forgot የይለፍ ቃል
forgot.helper: ኢሜይል እርስዎ used ወደ ፍጠር የእርስዎ Chatforia መለያ እና we'll ላክ እርስዎ secure link ወደ reset የእርስዎ የይለፍ ቃል. ያስገቡ።
forgot.genericError: Unable ወደ process request. Please try again በ moment.
forgot.sentHelper: If መለያ exists ከ that ኢሜይል, we've sent የይለፍ ቃል reset link. It may take few minutes ወደ arrive. Be sure ወደ check የእርስዎ spam ወይም promotions folder.

login.ssoUnavailable: Single-sign-በርቷል is currently unavailable. Use username & የይለፍ ቃል instead.

error.unprocessable: Invalid request. Check የእርስዎ username/ኢሜይል እና የይለፍ ቃል.
error.deviceLimit: Device limit reached ለ ነፃ ዕቅድ. Log out በርቷል another device ወይም አሻሽል ወደ Premium ወደ link more devices.

dialer.title: ጥሪዎች
dialer.subtitle: የቁጥር ሰሌዳ እና የቅርብ ጊዜዎች። (PSTN ካልተጠቀሙ፣ ጥሪዎችን ከውይይት ራስጌ ይጀምሩ።)

video.title: ቪዲዮ
video.roomsDesc: Multi-party ቪዲዮ using የተጋራ room ስም.
video.deeplinkTip: Tip: እርስዎ can deep link directly ወደ /ቪዲዮ?room=room-ስም.

direct.title: ቀጥታ ቪዲዮ
direct.subtitle: ጀምር 1:1 ቪዲዮ ጥሪ using ስልክ ቁጥር ወይም Chatforia username.
direct.tipInvite: Tip: Paste ቁጥር እና ጥሪ without saving እውቂያ. We’ll invite non-users በ link.

rooms.title: ክፍሎች
rooms.subtitle: ፍጠር room ወይም join existing one በ typing same ስም.
rooms.desc: Multi-party ቪዲዮ using የተጋራ room ስም.
rooms.tip: Tip: share ይህ ስም ከ others, ወይም deep link ወደ /ቪዲዮ?room=room-ስም.

phoneWarning.title: የእርስዎ ቁጥር is expiring soon
phoneWarning.body: የእርስዎ ቁጥር {{ቁጥር}} will be released በርቷል {{date}} unless reactivated. {{number}}

support.heading: እንዴት ልንረዳዎ እንችላለን?
support.contactIntro: We’ll try ወደ resolve ይህ instantly. If not, our team will follow up.
support.sent: Message sent. We’ll reply በ ኢሜይል.
support.sendError: Could not ላክ. ኢሜይል ድጋፍ@chatforia.com instead.
support.actionFailed: Could not complete that action. Please try again.
support.escalationMessage: We couldn’t resolve ይህ automatically. Our team will follow up.
support.genericError: አንድ ችግኝ ተፈጥሯል። እባክዎ እንደገና ይሞክሩ።
support.resolvedInstantly: Issue resolved instantly — አይ ticket needed.

account.q: How do I ፍጠር ወይም recover የእኔ መለያ?
account.a: app ወይም use web, tap “ፍጠር መለያ”, verify የእርስዎ ኢሜይል/phone. To recover, use “Forgot የይለፍ ቃል”. አውርድ

privacy.a: አዎ. Messages እና ጥሪዎች are end-ወደ-end encrypted በ default. Only እርስዎ እና recipient can read them.

translate.a: አንቃ “Auto-translate” በ ቅንብሮች → Appearance & ቋንቋ. We translate በርቷል-device where supported, otherwise through secure APIs ከ minimal metadata.

contact.a: Reach us at ድጋፍ@chatforia.com. Include screenshots እና የእርስዎ app version.

encryptionRecovery.title: Manage Encryption
encryptionRecovery.description: Back up, restore, unlock, ወይም reset የእርስዎ encryption key.

alert.keyRequiredBody: ይህ browser cannot currently decrypt የእርስዎ encrypted መልዕክቶች. Restore, unlock, ወይም reset የእርስዎ key ወደ continue.

unlockPasscode.label: Unlock passcode (የአሁኑ device)
unlockPasscode.description: Used ወደ decrypt የእርስዎ keys locally before exporting

restoreBackupPassword.label: Backup የይለፍ ቃል
restoreBackupPassword.description: The የይለፍ ቃል እርስዎ created when backing up የእርስዎ key በርቷል iPhone

newLocalPasscode.label: አዲስ local passcode
newLocalPasscode.description: Protect keys at rest በርቷል ይህ browser

resetLocalPasscode.label: አዲስ local passcode
resetLocalPasscode.description: ያስፈልጋል before resetting so አዲስ key is protected በርቷል ይህ device

errors.restoreIncomplete: Key restore incomplete ወይም incorrect ለ ይህ መለያ
errors.noServerPublicKey: ይህ መለያ does not currently expose server ህዝባዊ key
errors.serverBackupMismatch: Server backup does not match የአሁኑ መለያ encryption key
errors.resetIncomplete: Encryption reset did not complete correctly

confirm.reset: Reset encryption ለ ይህ መለያ? Older encrypted መልዕክቶች may become unreadable unless እርስዎ restore original key later.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: ይህ generates አዲስ encryption key ለ የእርስዎ መለያ. Older encrypted መልዕክቶች may become unreadable unless እርስዎ restore original key later.

press.title: Press
press.contactLine: For media inquiries, reach us at
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia is ግላዊነት-first messaging app that makes cross-ቋንቋ chat effortless. Messages are end-ወደ-end encrypted በ default, እና built-በ ትርጉም supports 100+ languages በ real time. Users can enable disappearing መልዕክቶች, keep read receipts አማራጭ, እና sync across devices. የሚገኝ በርቷል iOS, Android, እና web.
press.scanTip: በርቷል desktop? Scan ከ የእርስዎ phone ወደ get app.

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: We’re small founding team building Chatforia — የግል, global messenger launching በርቷል web, iOS, እና Android. If እርስዎ care about ግላዊነት, encryption, እና delightful user experiences, we’d love ወደ hear ከ እርስዎ.
careers.openRoles: ክፈት founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, ደህንነት & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: How ወደ apply: Use button below ወደ ኢሜይል የእርስዎ resume እና links.
careers.whyBullets: • እገዛ build foundation የ አዲስ global messenger. • Ship improvements used across web, iOS, እና Android. • Work directly ከ founder በርቷል architecture እና product direction. • Own high-impact areas የ stack: messaging, voice, ቪዲዮ, encryption, telecom, AI. • Join at beginning — before user base scales.

about.title: About Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia is secure, multilingual messenger ከ end-ወደ-end encryption, instant ትርጉም, እና voice/ቪዲዮ calling. Our mission is simple: እገዛ people connect—safely, privately, እና across languages.

values.control: Control: Disappearing መልዕክቶች & read receipts are አማራጭ.
values.control_aria: Control: Disappearing መልዕክቶች እና read receipts are አማራጭ.

about.howDescription: Messages are encrypted በርቷል የእርስዎ device before they leave it. ትርጉም, backups, እና device sync are designed ወደ minimize what our servers can see.

advertise.title: Advertise ከ Chatforia
advertise.description: Reach engaged messaging users ከ tasteful, brand-safe placements. We offer banner inventory በ high-visibility spots, sponsorships, እና house promos. Premium subscribers do not see ads.

adsense.withPubIdShort: We also serve inventory via Google AdSense. እርስዎ can target Chatforia ከ publisher ID {{pubId}}, ወይም use form below ለ direct sponsorships.
adsense.noPubIdShort: We also serve some inventory via Google AdSense. Direct sponsorships are የሚገኝ—use form below.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: We’re finalizing our ad inventory. Tell us about የእርስዎ campaign እና we’ll recommend placements.

why.highSession: High session frequency እና dwell time በ chat UI
why.deals: Direct deals ወይም programmatic via AdSense/Google Ads

form.submittedMsg: Thanks! የእርስዎ inquiry is በርቷል its way. We’ll follow up shortly.
form.missingRequired: Please fill በ ስም, ኢሜይል, እና መልዕክት.
form.successToast: Thanks! We’ll be በ touch soon.
form.mailtoInfo: Opening የእርስዎ ኢሜይል client ወደ ላክ inquiry…

legal.disclaimerStart: By submitting, እርስዎ agree ወደ our

randomChat.title: የዘፈቀደ ውይይት
randomChat.subtitle: አዲስ ሰው በቅጽበት ያግኙ፣ ወይም ከRia ጋር መወያየትን ይምረጡ።
randomChat.description: Chat anonymously first. Add Friend later if it feels right.
randomChat.setAge: Set የእርስዎ age range በ መገለጫ → Age & Random Chat ወደ be matched ከ people.
randomChat.waitingAddFriend: Waiting ለ them ወደ accept Add Friend…
randomChat.hiddenUsernames: Usernames stay hidden until both people choose Add Friend.
randomChat.riaSeparate: Chat ከ Ria anytime — separate ከ random human matching.

phoneNumberManager.freeNumberHint: ነፃ ቁጥር that may be recycled after inactivity.
phoneNumberManager.premiumNumberHint: Keep የእርስዎ ቁጥር while የእርስዎ Premium subscription is ንቁ.
phoneNumberManager.lockThisNumber: Lock ይህ ቁጥር (weekly add-በርቷል, coming soon)
phoneNumberManager.premiumProtectedHint: Premium numbers are protected ከ recycling while የእርስዎ Premium subscription is ንቁ.
phoneNumberManager.searchHint: 3-digit area code (US/CA only), ወይም leave blank, then ፈልግ. ያስገቡ።
phoneNumberManager.premiumKeepFeature: Keeping የእርስዎ ቁጥር is Premium feature.
phoneNumberManager.couldNotAssign: Could not assign that ቁጥር. It may have just been taken—try another.
phoneNumberManager.couldNotLease: Could not lease that ቁጥር. It may have just been taken—try another.
phoneNumberManager.couldNotProtectNow: Could not protect የእርስዎ ቁጥር right now.
phoneNumberManager.invalidAreaCode: Please enter 3-digit area code (e.g., 415) ወይም leave blank.
phoneNumberManager.noFreeNumbers: አይ ነፃ numbers are የሚገኝ right now.
phoneNumberManager.noInventoryAreaCode: አይ የሚገኝ inventory ለ that area code right now.
phoneNumberManager.noFreeNumbersAreaCode: አይ ነፃ numbers በ our pool ለ that area code right now.
phoneNumberManager.releaseConfirm: Release የእርስዎ የአሁኑ ቁጥር? It may be assigned ወደ someone else.
phoneNumberManager.releaseWarning: የእርስዎ ቁጥር may be released በ {{count}} day. አሻሽል ወደ Premium ወደ keep it protected.
phoneNumberManager.pickNumberHint: Pick Chatforia ቁጥር ወደ use ለ messaging እና communication inside app.

sounds.freeNoticeStart: እርስዎ’re በርቷል ነፃ — premium tones are shown but locked.

aiSettings.title: AI ቅንብሮች
aiSettings.controlIntro: Control ትርጉም, smart replies, እና ForiaBot auto-responses.
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: ላክ last few received መልዕክቶች (sanitized) ወደ AI ወደ suggest quick replies.
aiSettings.maskProfanity: በAI ጥቆማዎች ውስጥ አስደፋሪ ቃላትን ሸፍን
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: If በርቷል, suggestions returned በ AI will have flagged words masked

accessibilitySettings.title: ተደራሽነት እና ማንቂያዎች
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Options ወደ make Chatforia easier ወደ use without relying በርቷል sound.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Starts at normal size. Increase if እርስዎ prefer larger text.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Show banners እና ርዕስ blink so እርስዎ don’t miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Brief bright flash when ጥሪ rings.
accessibilitySettings.liveCaptionsDesc: Show real-time captions ከ other participant’s ድምጽ.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Attach transcript ወደ ድምጽ መልዕክቶች እርስዎ receive.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Store only ciphertext በርቷል server. Disables AI/Translate እና moderation previews.
privacySection.strictE2EEEnabled: Strict E2EE ነቅቷል. AI/Translate will be disabled.

linkedDevicesPanel.title: የተገናኙ መሣሪያዎች
linkedDevicesPanel.renamePrompt: አዲስ ስም ለ ይህ device ያስገቡ።

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: saved እውቂያዎች በ alias, ስም, username, ወይም phone ፈልግ
peoplePage.quickStartDesc: Manage የእርስዎ እውቂያዎች እና invite friends.
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Share የእርስዎ invite link ወደ ጀምር chatting instantly.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Stay በ touch በርቷል go ከ Chatforia ለ iOS እና Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Tip: የእርስዎ መልዕክቶች stay synced across web እና mobile.

dialer.title: ጥሪዎች
dialer.subtitle: የቁጥር ሰሌዳ እና የቅርብ ጊዜዎች። (PSTN ካልተጠቀሙ፣ ጥሪዎችን ከውይይት ራስጌ ይጀምሩ።)
dialer.callRequiredNumber: እርስዎ need Chatforia ቁጥር before placing phone ጥሪዎች.

callHistory.title: ጥሪዎች
callHistory.subtitle: የእርስዎ recent ገቢ እና ወጪ ጥሪዎች.
callHistory.emptySubtitle: የእርስዎ recent ጥሪዎች will show up here.

direct.title: ቀጥታ ቪዲዮ
direct.subtitle: ጀምር 1:1 ቪዲዮ ጥሪ ከ another user.

rooms.title: ክፍሎች
rooms.subtitle: ፍጠር room ወይም join existing one በ typing same ስም.
rooms.desc: Multi-party ቪዲዮ using የተጋራ room ስም.
rooms.tip: Tip: share ይህ ስም ከ others, ወይም deep link ወደ
